claims.claim_text: A structured task specification has been written for this package.

decision_criteria.fail_requires: explicit evidence that task specification is invalid or contradicted
decision_criteria.note: aieng write-task-spec sets this to pass automatically when the file is created.
decision_criteria.pass_requires: task/task_spec.yaml present in package with schema_validated verification status

claims.notes: task/task_spec.yaml is present. Claim is pass.

claims.claim_text: An external tool handoff contract has been written for this package.

decision_criteria.fail_requires: explicit evidence that handoff contract is invalid or contradicted
decision_criteria.note: aieng write-external-tool-requirements sets this to pass automatically when the file is created.
decision_criteria.pass_requires: task/external_tool_requirements.json present in package with schema_validated verification status

claims.notes: task/external_tool_requirements.json is present. Claim is pass.

claims.claim_text: Solver result evidence is available for this package.

decision_criteria.fail_requires: explicit evidence of solver failure or numeric results contradicting engineering targets
decision_criteria.needs_review_if: solver result evidence present but all numeric_observations in not_found
decision_criteria.note: Use aieng update-claim --claim-id claim_solver_result_001 --status pass --evidence-id <id> after reviewing numeric observations.
decision_criteria.pass_requires: at least one evidence item with evidence_type=solver_result and verification_status in [available, schema_validated, unverified]

claims.notes: No solver result evidence has been attached. External solver execution required.

claims.claim_text: Mesh generation evidence is available for this package.

decision_criteria.needs_review_if: mesh evidence present but mesh_summary absent or quality metrics not declared
decision_criteria.note: Use aieng update-claim --claim-id claim_mesh_evidence_001 --status pass --evidence-id <id> after reviewing mesh summary.
decision_criteria.pass_requires: at least one evidence item with evidence_type=mesh_evidence and verification_status in [available, schema_validated, unverified]

claims.notes: No mesh evidence has been attached. External CAE mesh generation required.

claims.claim_text: CAD geometry modification evidence is available for this package.

decision_criteria.fail_requires: explicit evidence of failed CAD geometry modification
decision_criteria.note: Use aieng update-claim --claim-id claim_geometry_modification_001 --status pass --evidence-id <id> after external CAD writeback completes.
decision_criteria.pass_requires: at least one evidence item with evidence_type=geometry_modification and verification_status in [available, schema_validated, unverified]; external CAD tool must have written back a modified geometry artifact

claims.notes: No geometry modification evidence has been attached. External CAD tool required.
